name: rDNA_unit_architecture
description: Architecture record for the S. pombe ~10.4 kb 35S rDNA unit. Each unit encodes the Pol I 35S pre-rRNA (18S-ITS1-5.8S-ITS2-25S) plus an NTS spacer with ARS-like origin activity. Unlike S. cerevisiae, the S. pombe 5S rRNA genes (~30 copies) are NOT embedded in the rDNA array but are scattered as solo Pol III units across the genome. Tandem unit identity within an array is >99%; arrays expand/contract via unequal sister-chromatid exchange.

architecture.internal_structure: 35S Pol I unit (18S-ITS1-5.8S-ITS2-25S, ~7 kb) plus NTS spacer (~3.4 kb); no embedded 5S
